commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR disables pi-coding-agent auto-retry inside prepared embedded Pi settings, updates the focused settings test, and moves the changelog entry into Unreleased.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main leaves embedded Pi retry enabled, while pi-coding-agent 0.75.3 defaults retry to enabled and retries by removing the assistant error before continuing. I did not run a live Feishu/Qwen replay loop in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No repair job is needed; the branch already contains the narrow fix and can continue through automerge or maintainer acceptance of the compatibility risk.
